title: Site Template theme.json
description: Manifest for a theme package under public/themes/theme_<name>/. It is both the app's loader manifest and the portable spec for authoring a compatible theme. See AUTHORING.md (next to this file) for the CSS class vocabulary a theme must style and the full authoring guide. The canonical token registry lives in config/tokens.php.

name.description: Theme identifier. Must match the folder suffix: folder theme_<name>. This is what SiteSetting.theme and app:apply-theme compare against.

title.description: Human-readable name shown in the admin Themes picker, e.g. 'Default (Light)'.

description.description: One-line summary of the theme's look, shown in the admin Themes picker.

version.description: Optional semantic version of the theme package.

screenshot.description: Optional path (relative to the theme folder) to a preview image shown in the admin Themes picker, e.g. 'screenshot.png'.

page_home_class.description: RESERVED — not yet consumed by the app. The layout currently hardcodes the 'page-home' body class on Home; style .page-home directly.

tokens.description: Design tokens this theme sets. Keys must be names from config/tokens.php (the registry of safe light defaults); omitted tokens fall back to those defaults. Every color/font/space/radius in the theme's CSS must reference a token via var(--<name>) rather than a literal, so values stay overridable by SiteSetting.branding.

type.description: Value kind: color (#hex/rgb/named), font-stack (CSS font-family list), length (rem/px/etc.), or shadow (box-shadow value).

role.description: Documentation of where this token is used in the theme's CSS (e.g. 'Headings; hero title'). Keep accurate so the manifest stays a true map of token -> element.

value.description: The token's value for this theme, e.g. '#ffffff' or '0.5rem'.

fonts.description: Self-hosted font faces the theme ships under fonts/. Declare the matching @font-face in a CSS file listed in assets.css, and point the font-* tokens at these families.

family.description: CSS font-family name, as referenced by a font-* token.

files.description: Font file paths relative to the theme folder, e.g. ['fonts/Cinzel.woff2'].

used_for.description: Note on what this face is used for, e.g. 'headings'.

assets.description: CSS (and optional JS) the layout loads for this theme, in array order.

css.description: Stylesheet paths relative to the theme folder, loaded in order. Convention: structure.css (layout only) then skin.css (token-driven appearance); fonts first if used.

js.description: Optional scripts loaded at end of body, in order.

src.description: Script path relative to the theme folder.

views.description: Blade view slots the theme provides under views/, exposed via the theme:: namespace.

namespace.description: Blade namespace for the theme's views. Must be 'theme'.

hero.description: View name (without .blade.php) for the Home hero, rendered as theme::hero on the Home page.

cosmos.description: View name for an optional site-wide backdrop, rendered as theme::cosmos behind every page. Omit for a flat background.

solar-motif.description: View name for an optional compact, non-interactive reuse of the Home hero's motif (no title/copy), rendered as theme::solar-motif via @includeIf. Not currently included by any core view. Omit to leave that spot empty.

nav.description: RESERVED — not yet consumed. The layout always renders the shared resources/views/partials/nav.blade.php; this slot does not currently override it.
